Package io.vertigo.audit.plugins.ledger.ethereum

Class EthereumLedgerPlugin

java.lang.Object
io.vertigo.audit.plugins.ledger.ethereum.EthereumLedgerPlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
LedgerPlugin, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable, io.vertigo.core.node.component.CoreComponent, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Plugin
public final class EthereumLedgerPlugin extends Object implements LedgerPlugin, io.vertigo.core.node.component.Activeable
Client RPC Ethereum (for Geth and Parity)
Author:
xdurand
